GOA.name: The Leela Goa
GOA.highlights: Award-winning resort on a private lagoon. The gold standard of Goa luxury.

GOA.name: Novotel Goa Resort & Spa
GOA.highlights: Reliable mid-range choice with direct beach access and great buffet breakfasts.

GOA.name: La Maison Fontainhas
GOA.highlights: A Portuguese-era house in Goa's most charming quarter. For travellers who want authenticity over amenities.

SRINAGAR.name: The Lalit Grand Palace
SRINAGAR.highlights: A former Maharaja's palace overlooking Dal Lake. Arguably the most romantic stay in India.

SRINAGAR.name: Houseboat — Sukoon
SRINAGAR.highlights: Waking up on the Dal Lake to mist-covered mountains is an experience you will remember forever.

SRINAGAR.name: Hotel Boulevard
SRINAGAR.highlights: Clean, reliable option with lake-view rooms at a fraction of the luxury price.

JAIPUR.name: Taj Rambagh Palace
JAIPUR.highlights: Once the official residence of the Maharaja of Jaipur. The pinnacle of Indian palace hospitality.

JAIPUR.name: ITC Rajputana
JAIPUR.highlights: Rajasthani architecture meets modern comfort. Great central location for city exploration.

JAIPUR.name: Pearl Palace Heritage
JAIPUR.highlights: Award-winning budget gem. Stunning rooftop restaurant with city views.

VARANASI.name: Stops Hostel Varanasi
VARANASI.highlights: Walking distance to Assi Ghat, perfect for solo travellers

VARANASI.name: BrijRama Palace
VARANASI.highlights: 18th century palace directly on the Ganges — witness Aarti from your room

VARANASI.name: Taj Ganges Varanasi
VARANASI.highlights: Taj luxury in the spiritual capital of India

PORTBLAIR.name: Taj Exotica Resort & Spa, Andamans
PORTBLAIR.highlights: The only true luxury resort in the Andamans. Surrounded by untouched jungle and beach.

PORTBLAIR.name: Symphony Palms Beach Resort
PORTBLAIR.highlights: Steps from Asia's best beach. Comfortable rooms with knowledgeable island-tour desk.

PORTBLAIR.name: Barefoot at Havelock
PORTBLAIR.highlights: Rustic eco-cottages right in the jungle 2 min from the beach. A favourite with divers.

KOCHI.name: CGH Earth Brunton Boatyard
KOCHI.highlights: A restored 19th-century boatyard with stunning harbour views. The finest address in Fort Kochi.

KOCHI.name: Vivanta Kochi
KOCHI.highlights: Modern luxury with great lagoon views. Well located for Fort Kochi and Marine Drive.

KOCHI.name: Old Harbour Hotel
KOCHI.highlights: A restored 300-year-old Dutch trading house. Atmospheric and wonderfully charming.

COORG.name: Vivanta Coorg
COORG.highlights: Perched in dense coffee forests with misty morning views. Best pool in Coorg.

COORG.name: Honey Valley Estate
COORG.highlights: An organic coffee estate homestay deep in Coorg. Wake up to absolute silence, birdsong and fresh coffee.

COORG.name: Hotel Capitol Village
COORG.highlights: Clean, simple, central. Good base for day trips to all Coorg attractions.

RISHIKESH.name: Ananda in the Himalayas
RISHIKESH.highlights: Consistently ranked among the world's top 10 destination spas. A transformative experience.

RISHIKESH.name: Aloha on the Ganges
RISHIKESH.highlights: Sit on your private balcony and watch the Ganges flow past. Incredible value for location.

RISHIKESH.name: Zostel Rishikesh
RISHIKESH.highlights: The social hub of Rishikesh. Great for solo travellers who want to meet people.

TIRUPATI.name: Bliss Hotel
TIRUPATI.highlights: Best amenities in Tirupati. Comfortable stay for pilgrims seeking a touch of comfort.

TIRUPATI.name: Marasa Sarovar Premiere
TIRUPATI.highlights: Clean, reliable, well-located for airport and early morning Tirumala buses.

TIRUPATI.name: TTDC Guest House (Tirumala)
TIRUPATI.highlights: Stay on Tirumala Hill itself — no early morning bus rush. Booking via TTD portal required.

LEH.name: The Grand Dragon Ladakh
LEH.highlights: The most refined address in Ladakh with jaw-dropping mountain panoramas from every window.

LEH.name: Stok Palace Heritage Hotel
LEH.highlights: Stay in the actual palace of the Namgyal royal family. A once-in-a-lifetime heritage experience.

LEH.name: Zostel Leh
LEH.highlights: Heart of the Ladakh adventure community. Best place to find biking & trekking companions.

PONDICHERRY.name: Le Dupleix
PONDICHERRY.highlights: A restored 1900 French mansion in the heart of the Quartier Français. Pondicherry's finest.

PONDICHERRY.name: Palais de Mahé
PONDICHERRY.highlights: A lovingly restored French house. Perfect blend of colonial charm and modern comfort.

PONDICHERRY.name: Surguru Hotel
PONDICHERRY.highlights: Clean, central and great value. Walking distance from the French Quarter and Promenade Beach.

AGRA.name: The Oberoi Amarvilas
amenities: Direct Taj Mahal View from Every Room
AGRA.highlights: Every room has an unobstructed view of the Taj Mahal. Watching sunrise from bed is the most surreal experience in India.

AGRA.name: ITC Mughal Agra
AGRA.highlights: Stunning Mughal-style architecture with 23 acres of gardens. Best pool in Agra.

AGRA.name: Hotel Kamal
AGRA.highlights: Famous rooftop restaurant with a Taj Mahal view at a fraction of Oberoi prices.

MATHURA.name: Radha Ashok Hotel
MATHURA.highlights: Best amenities available in Mathura. Clean, reliable and close to the main temples.

MATHURA.name: Brijwasi Royal
MATHURA.highlights: 5-minute walk from Krishna Janmabhoomi. Pure vegetarian food and a devout atmosphere.

MATHURA.name: ISKCON Guesthouse Vrindavan
MATHURA.highlights: Stay within the ISKCON complex. The Mangala Aarti at 4:30am is a life-changing experience.

SHILLONG.name: Ri Kynjai
SHILLONG.highlights: Luxurious lakeside cottages in a forested setting. The most peaceful luxury resort in Northeast India.

SHILLONG.name: Polo Towers
SHILLONG.highlights: Well-located with comfortable rooms. Walking distance from Police Bazar, cafés and markets.

SHILLONG.name: La Galleria
SHILLONG.highlights: A charming small guesthouse with a café serving excellent cakes and Khasi food.

AMRITSAR.name: Taj Swarna
AMRITSAR.highlights: Finest hotel in Amritsar. Provides dedicated shuttle to Golden Temple including for 4am Amrit Vela.

AMRITSAR.name: Hyatt Regency Amritsar
AMRITSAR.highlights: Modern luxury with an excellent breakfast buffet. 20 mins from Golden Temple.

AMRITSAR.name: Hotel CJ Grand
AMRITSAR.highlights: 10-minute walk from the Golden Temple. Clean rooms, great price and unbeatable location.

AGATTI.name: Bangaram Island Resort
AGATTI.highlights: Accessible only by boat from Agatti. India's most exclusive island resort — no cars, no crowds, no wi-fi.

AGATTI.name: Sports Club Resort, Agatti
AGATTI.highlights: Simple cottages steps from a brilliant lagoon. Perfect for serious snorkellers and divers.

AGATTI.name: SPORTS Complex Guest House, Kavaratti
AGATTI.highlights: Requires advance booking via SPORTS authority. Basic but honest — the lagoon is the luxury.

BARCELONA.name: Hotel Arts Barcelona
BARCELONA.highlights: Towering above Barceloneta Beach with panoramic city-to-sea views. The most glamorous address in Barcelona.

BARCELONA.name: Hotel Rec Barcelona
BARCELONA.highlights: Stylish hotel in El Born — Barcelona's coolest neighbourhood. Walking distance to Gothic Quarter and beach.

BARCELONA.name: Generator Barcelona
BARCELONA.highlights: Barcelona's trendiest hostel. The rooftop bar is a social institution and the rooms are genuinely comfortable.

PARIS.name: Four Seasons Hotel George V
PARIS.highlights: The most celebrated hotel in Paris. The flower arrangements alone are worth a visit.

PARIS.name: Hotel La Comtesse Tour Eiffel
PARIS.highlights: Rooms with Eiffel Tower views at under ₹20,000/night. Exceptional value for central Paris.

PARIS.name: Hotel du Commerce
PARIS.highlights: In the heart of the Latin Quarter. Paris at budget prices — very hard to find.

MALE.name: One&Only Reethi Rah
MALE.highlights: Consistently ranked in the world's top 5 hotels. Every villa has a private pool over the lagoon.

MALE.name: Sun Island Resort & Spa
MALE.highlights: One of the Maldives' largest resorts with a great house reef and whale shark snorkelling. Best value overwater.

MALE.name: Embudu Village
MALE.highlights: The original budget Maldives resort — 20 mins from Malé airport by speedboat. Great house reef, no frills.

BANGKOK.name: Mandarin Oriental Bangkok
BANGKOK.highlights: Arguably Asia's most famous hotel, open since 1876. Joseph Conrad and Somerset Maugham stayed here.

BANGKOK.name: Sindhorn Midtown Hotel Bangkok
BANGKOK.highlights: A rooftop pool, great location near Lumphini Park and excellent value. Bangkok's best mid-range.

BANGKOK.name: Lub d Bangkok Silom
BANGKOK.highlights: Bangkok's best hostel with a rooftop pool. Excellent base for Silom nightlife and BTS travel.

DUBAI.name: Burj Al Arab Jumeirah
DUBAI.highlights: The world's only 7-star hotel. Staying here is an event, not just accommodation.

DUBAI.name: Atlantis The Palm
DUBAI.highlights: Children's absolute favourite — the waterpark alone justifies the stay. Best family hotel in the Middle East.

DUBAI.name: Rove Downtown Dubai
DUBAI.highlights: 5-minute walk from Burj Khalifa and Dubai Mall. The smartest budget choice in Dubai.

SINGAPORE.name: Marina Bay Sands
SINGAPORE.highlights: The most photographed hotel in the world. That infinity pool view from 57 floors up is unforgettable.

SINGAPORE.name: Hotel Indigo Singapore Katong
SINGAPORE.highlights: Beautifully designed hotel in Singapore's most charming neighbourhood. Near the best hawker stalls.

SINGAPORE.name: Wink Hostel
SINGAPORE.highlights: Stylish pod hostel in Chinatown. Best budget option in a city where budget is hard to find.

LONAVALA.name: Fariyas Resort Lonavala
LONAVALA.highlights: Best resort in Lonavala with valley views and large pool. Great weekend packages.

LONAVALA.name: The Machan
LONAVALA.highlights: Elevated treehouses in a pristine forest with no Wi-Fi by design. The most romantic stay near Mumbai.

LONAVALA.name: Hotel Chandralok
LONAVALA.highlights: Clean, simple and well-priced. Good base for Lonavala day trips without breaking the bank.

RANTHAMBORE.name: Aman-i-Khas
RANTHAMBORE.highlights: One of the world's greatest safari camps. Private game drives, expert naturalists, pure Aman magic.

RANTHAMBORE.name: Sher Bagh Camp
RANTHAMBORE.highlights: Inspired by British Raj-era tiger camps. Incredible food, great guides and authentic jungle atmosphere.

RANTHAMBORE.name: Hotel Tiger Safari
RANTHAMBORE.highlights: Clean, reliable, good safari desk. Best budget option near the reserve gates.

DARJEELING.name: Mayfair Hill Resort
DARJEELING.highlights: A heritage resort with jaw-dropping Kanchenjunga views. Wake up to the mountain above the clouds.

DARJEELING.name: Elgin Darjeeling
DARJEELING.highlights: A Raj-era colonial hotel with beautifully preserved character. Excellent library and tea service.

DARJEELING.name: Dekeling Hotel
DARJEELING.highlights: Beloved by backpackers for decades. Tibetan-style guesthouse with genuine warmth and mountain views.

JOSHIMATH.name: Auli Clifftop Club
JOSHIMATH.highlights: The only resort in Auli with direct ski access and unobstructed Nanda Devi peak views.

JOSHIMATH.name: Snow Crest Inn
JOSHIMATH.highlights: Reliable trekker base in Joshimath. Knowledgeable staff help plan Valley of Flowers permits.

JOSHIMATH.name: GMVN Tourist Rest House
JOSHIMATH.highlights: Run by Garhwal Mandal Vikas Nigam. Reliable government accommodation at the trekking gateway.

KAZA.name: The Himalayan Shelter
KAZA.highlights: The finest stay in Spiti with stunning views of the valley. Warm, well-insulated rooms are rare here.

KAZA.name: Sakya Abode
KAZA.highlights: A genuine Spitian family homestay. The best way to experience local culture and Himalayan hospitality.

KAZA.name: Zostel Kaza
KAZA.highlights: Community hub for Spiti adventurers. Great source for information on passes, treks and permits.

HAMPI.name: Evolve Back Kampovar, Hampi
HAMPI.highlights: Stunning infinity pool overlooking boulder-scapes and ruins. The most luxurious Hampi experience possible.

HAMPI.name: The Hampi Heritage
HAMPI.highlights: Clean, comfortable and close to major temples. Good restaurant serving local Karnataka thalis.

HAMPI.name: Guesthouses, Virupapur Gadde
HAMPI.highlights: The iconic 'Hippie Island' across the river from Hampi. Basic but magical. The coracle ride every morning never gets old.

OOTY.name: Savoy Hotel Ooty
OOTY.highlights: A 1829 colonial hotel with roaring fireplaces and old-world charm. Feels like stepping into a Graham Greene novel.

OOTY.name: Fortune Sullivan Court
OOTY.highlights: Reliable hotel with good amenities. Walking distance from botanical gardens and bus stand.

OOTY.name: Hotel Welbeck
OOTY.highlights: Simple, clean and central. Best budget hotel in Ooty with a functional restaurant.

PURI.name: Mayfair Beach Resort Puri
PURI.highlights: Best beach resort in Puri with a dedicated service for Jagannath Temple visits.

PURI.name: Toshali Sands Resort
PURI.highlights: Beautifully designed Odishan tribal-inspired resort. The evening Odissi dance performance is magical.

PURI.name: Hotel Gandhara
PURI.highlights: 5-minute walk from Jagannath Temple. Pure vegetarian kitchen serves prasadam-style meals.

KASHMIR.name: Houseboat Nelofar
KASHMIR.highlights: Authentic houseboat stay on Dal Lake with shikara access

KASHMIR.name: The Lalit Grand Palace
KASHMIR.highlights: Former royal palace with stunning Zabarwan mountain views

KASHMIR.name: Khyber Himalayan Resort & Spa
KASHMIR.highlights: India's finest ski resort with panoramic Himalayan views

RAJASTHAN.name: Moustache Jaipur Hostel
RAJASTHAN.highlights: Best budget stay in Jaipur with famous rooftop pool

RAJASTHAN.name: Alsisar Haveli
RAJASTHAN.highlights: 19th century haveli with authentic Rajasthani architecture and hospitality

RAJASTHAN.name: Rambagh Palace
RAJASTHAN.highlights: Former residence of the Maharaja of Jaipur — the jewel of Jaipur

MALDIVES.name: Cinnamon Hakuraa Huraa
MALDIVES.highlights: Best value island resort with house reef snorkelling

MALDIVES.name: Centara Grand Island Resort
MALDIVES.highlights: Overwater villas with direct lagoon access and whale shark diving

MALDIVES.name: One & Only Reethi Rah
MALDIVES.highlights: One of the world's finest resorts — private island paradise

THAILAND.name: NapPark Hostel Bangkok
THAILAND.highlights: Heart of Bangkok's backpacker scene — incredible value

THAILAND.name: Avani+ Riverside Bangkok
THAILAND.highlights: Stunning Chao Phraya views with rooftop infinity pool

THAILAND.name: Mandarin Oriental Bangkok
THAILAND.highlights: One of the world's greatest hotels since 1876 — timeless Bangkok luxury
